page.title: Initial Setup
page.description: Check the machine, install OpenClaw with the official installer, configure an OpenAI-compatible API key, and start Gateway.

environment.title: Check the environment
environment.description: OpenClaw can bootstrap Node.js and npm if they are missing, so this step is informational and never blocks the install flow.

install.title: Install OpenClaw
install.description: Run the official installer script, then register the local Gateway service.

notice.title: Official bootstrap
notice.description: The installer can automatically install Node.js / npm when needed, so you do not need to prepare the runtime manually.

config.title: Configure the provider
config.description: Enter an OpenAI-compatible base URL, API key, and model, then save the official OpenClaw config.
config.defaultValues: The configuration file is missing, so the form is using default values.

gateway.title: Start Gateway
gateway.description: Start the local Gateway runtime and verify that it is listening on loopback.

status.helper: After Gateway starts, the dashboard and command surface become available.

complete.title: Setup complete
complete.description: OpenClaw is installed, configured, and Gateway is ready to use.
complete.summary: You can open the dashboard, manage providers, and continue into the rest of the workspace.
